cross_scene_arcs.title: Strack Deal and Corruption Exposure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie is appointed negotiator for the Stracks, faces distrust, fails to close the deal at sixty million, uncovers bribery in a memo, and ends her relationship with Strack after learning he orchestrated the fire that burned Peyton.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Appointed lead negotiator with client distrust and a strict price target.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ends relationship with Strack, aware of his criminal involvement, and becomes a target for retaliation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to assist Peyton and protect herself from Strack's retaliation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Julie and Peyton's Relationship Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie declines Peyton's marriage proposal, grieves at his burial, encounters him disfigured without recognition, reaffirms her love at a cafe, witnesses his violent outburst, confronts him in his lab, and is rejected by Darkman in the elevator.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Strained relationship after declining Peyton's spontaneous proposal.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rejected by Darkman who claims Peyton is gone, left alone searching in the crowd.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Julie can ever reconnect with Darkman or if Peyton is permanently lost.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pauly's Role in Durant's Gang and Resulting Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pauly begins as a subordinate in Durant's group, acts as a physical enforcer, but later steals from Durant, creating antagonism.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Disarmed and enduring mockery as part of Durant's group at the wharf.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Has stolen a coney, angering Durant and setting up potential retaliation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Durant will retaliate for Pauly's theft.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Darkman's Attack and Impersonation of Pauly
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pauly is chloroformed and robbed by Darkman, who impersonates him in a briefcase exchange, leading to Pauly being accused of theft and the impersonator fleeing with a time-limited synthetic skin.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sleeping in his bed, unaware of the impending attack.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Under accusation of theft by Durant, while the impersonator is on the run with synthetic skin degrading within 98 minutes.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the impersonation will be discovered and the outcome after the synthetic skin fails.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Julie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peyton proposes to Julie but is rejected; after disfigurement, he is unrecognized and rejected by her; he secretly visits her, attempts a reunion that fails due to sunlight vulnerability; Julie confronts him and declares love, but he ultimately rejects her and severs the relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton proposes marriage to Julie on the street.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Darkman rejects Julie and affirms his new identity, ending the romantic tie.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Peyton can ever reconnect with Julie or if his transformation has permanently altered their connection.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Vendetta Against Durant
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Durant's men ambush and torture Peyton, killing his colleague Yakitito; later, Peyton finds Durant's lighter in his ruined lab, triggering intense rage and hallucinations.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton is violently attacked by Durant's associates in the lab.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Peyton is consumed by rage against Durant, indicating an ongoing vendetta.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Peyton will act on his rage and seek revenge against Durant.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Becoming Darkman
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After an explosion severely injures him, Peyton becomes a burn patient with severed pain nerves and enhanced strength; he returns to his destroyed lab, experiences a breakdown, and adopts the Darkman persona; he later affirms this new identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peyton is injured in an explosion and hospitalized as a burn patient.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Peyton has fully transformed into Darkman, accepting his disfigured and altered state.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Darkman will navigate his new identity and abilities in the future.
